notes: Live Shopify 2026-04 capture for BXGY entitlement connection reads. The setup creates separate product records for product entitlements and variant entitlements because Shopify rejects product+variant duplicate entitlement within the same DiscountProducts block. Strict targets compare complete selected customerBuys/customerGets item connection payloads for initial singular reads, cursor window membership/order, staged resource update readback, staged variant deletion, staged product/collection deletion, and discount catalog readback; generated GIDs and opaque cursors are treated as volatile while titles, handles, status, SKUs, connection order, nodes/edges/pageInfo shape, and pageInfo booleans remain strict.
